body.processed:
This living room design pairs our Vermont Modern coffee table and media console with a neutral sofa and warm textiles to create a space that's both stylish and inviting. The black walnut pieces anchor the room while allowing the natural light to shine.

The key to this look is balance: clean-lined furniture paired with soft textures like linen, wool, and natural fiber rugs. Plants and ceramics add organic warmth without clutter.

image.alt: Modern living room with walnut furniture and neutral tones

body.processed:
Gather around our Farmstead harvest table for meals that bring people together. This dining room design seats ten comfortably and showcases the beauty of reclaimed wood against whitewashed walls and industrial lighting.

The matching farm bench on one side and Windsor chairs on the other create an informal, welcoming atmosphere perfect for family dinners and holiday gatherings.

image.alt: Rustic farmhouse dining room with harvest table

nodes.title: Studio Apartment Bedroom

body.processed:
Maximize your small space without sacrificing style. Our Studio collection storage bed with built-in drawers eliminates the need for a separate dresser, while the wall-mounted nightstand shelves keep the floor clear for a spacious feel.

The white oak pieces brighten the room and pair beautifully with soft linens and minimalist decor. Every inch of this design is intentional and functional.
